title: Construction of Chapter
doc_html:
§1806.  Construction of Chapter

Nothing in this Chapter shall be construed as attempting to substitute, transfer, or supersede the proper constitutional or statutory function or jurisdiction of any state agency or head thereof by any other state agency.

Acts 1980, No. 827, §2.
doc_text:
§1806.  Construction of Chapter
Nothing in this Chapter shall be construed as attempting to substitute, transfer, or supersede the proper constitutional or statutory function or jurisdiction of any state agency or head thereof by any other state agency.
Acts 1980, No. 827, §2.
